items.headline: NBA on Fire 2025 - 2026 Season - Episode 26
items.description: Welcome to the Playoffs! This week we zero in on all of the First Round drama, as we start a fresh new chapter of the NBA season!

items.headline: Full Game Highlights: Houston Rockets @ Los Angeles Lakers
items.description: Full Game Highlights: Houston Rockets @ Los Angeles Lakers

items.headline: Dillon Brooks Mic'd Up in Game 1 vs. OKC
items.description: Check out Dillon Brooks mic’d up vs. OKC in Game 1!

items.headline: Alex Caruso Mic'd Up in Game 1 vs PHX
items.description: Take a look at Alex Caruso mic’d up vs. PHX in Game 1!

items.headline: LeBron James Reverse Dunk vs. HOU Game 2
items.description: LeBron James throws down a powerful reverse dunk in Game 2 vs. Houston!

items.headline: Game Recap: Lakers 101, Rockets 94
items.description: The Los Angeles Lakers defeat the Houston Rockets, 101-94, to take a 2-0 series lead.

items.headline: Game Recap: Trail Blazers 106, Spurs 103
items.description: The Blazers closed the game on a 16-4 run over the final five minutes to defeat the Spurs, 106-103, and even the series at 1-1.

items.headline: LeBron James leads Lakers with 28-8-7 in Game 2
items.description: LeBron James finishes with 28 points, eight rebounds and seven assists in the lakers Game 2 win over the Rockets.

items.headline: Marcus Smart scores 25, hits five threes in Lakers win
items.description: Marcus Smart scores 25 points, including hitting five 3-pointers in the Lakers Game 2 victory over the Rockets.
